description: Immerse your subscribers in the vibrant world of art with this beautifully designed email template. Perfect for events, marketing and design, or global observances such as World Art Day, this template allows you to introduce a featured artist and their work, alongside a blog post to provide a deeper dive into their creative process. With its focus on art and artists, this template is a great way to celebrate and share the beauty and diversity of global art. Its visually engaging design ensures your newsletter will stand out in your subscribers' inboxes, making it a must-have for anyone in the arts industry.
short_description: Discover the world of art with our unique newsletter. Perfect for marketers, event organizers, or art enthusiasts, it brings artist profiles, blog articles, and world art day celebrations to your inbox. Stay connected with the international art scene. Celebrate global artistic talent with our visually inspiring content.

designer.description: I am a Chicago-based graphic designer. I specialize in working with natural brands. I can work with you remotely or in-person as your creative partner to tackle branding and marketing projects of any format, digital or print. Let's make something amazing together.

html_data:
BLOG
ARTISTS
LOG IN

World
Art
Day

World Art Day is on April 15th, in honor of Leonardo da Vinci’s birthday. Da Vinci combined arts and sciences in an unprecedented way. At UX App, this intersection of arts and technology is at the core of who we are. In this newsletter issue, we wanted to highlight an amazing artist in our community.

 

WORLD ART DAY FEATURE

Ásta Ölvirsson

Our featured artist, Ásta Ölvirsson has made a name for herself with her distinctive illustration style. Watch the video to see a day in her life as an illustrator and hear the story of how she went from a corporate job to running her own creative agency.

 
 

Minimalism is the essence of design, and design is the essence of beauty.

 
 

A typical day in Ásta’s life includes waking up at 5:30 AM, going for a run, then throwing on some tunes, making a cup of matcha tea, and then illustrating. She believes the discipline of creating something everyday strengthens inspiration and guarantees growth.

 

Every canvas asks the artist what it will become. The artist is the life-giver of the art.

 
Watch Ásta’s Story
 

CONNECT WITH US

© All rights reserved | 2021

Changed your mind? You can unsubscribe at any time.

Minimalism is the essence of design, and design is the essence of beauty.

A typical day in Ásta’s life includes waking up at 5:30 AM, going for a run, then throwing on some tunes, making a cup of matcha tea, and then illustrating. She believes the discipline of creating something everyday strengthens inspiration and guarantees growth.
